name: meridian-automation
description: Daily automation service for the Meridian on-chain CLOB: create-strikes (morning) and settle (after close) jobs.
comment:web3-pin: Pinned @solana/web3.js to exactly 1.95.3 (not ^): 1.98.x's ESM build imports rpc-websockets/dist/lib/client, which rpc-websockets@9 removed (1.98 depends on ^9), breaking under Node's strict ESM. 1.95.3 ships with rpc-websockets@7.x (which has that path + the matching CommonClient), so the on-chain chain loads. anchor/spl-token/pyth dedupe to this version.
